# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app1.example.com"
        - "https://app2.example.com"
      methods:
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "PUT"
        - "DELETE"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers:
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Authorization"
        - "X-Requested-With"
        - "Accept"
        - "Origin"
      exposed_headers:
        - "Authorization"
        - "X-Request-ID"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
    tags:
      - "global"
    enabled: true

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_names:
        - "apikey"
      anonymous: ""
      run_on_preflight: true
    tags:
      - "global"
    enabled: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      limit_by: "consumer"
      policy: "local"
      hide_client_headers: false
      fault_tolerant: true
    tags:
      - "global"
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: "http://userservice:8080"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app1.example.com"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
          credentials: true
        tags:
          - "service"
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          anonymous: ""
        tags:
          - "service"
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          limit_by: "consumer"
          policy: "local"
        tags:
          - "service"
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: user-login
    paths:
      - "/login"
    service:
      name: user-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app1.example.com"
          methods:
            - "POST"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
          credentials: false
        tags:
          - "route"
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          limit_by: "consumer"
          policy: "local"
        tags:
          - "route"
        enabled: true
